gist.headline: Choose your own timeline
gist.blurb: StoryFlux joins the Creative showcase. It's an engine for branching narratives where every choice spins up a new AI-generated path.
gist.summary: Added StoryFlux, an interactive storytelling app with branching narratives, to the Creative showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and play through AI-generated interactive stories where their choices dynamically shape the plot.
gist.visual_concept: A magical storytelling session. A large open book serves as the anchor, with glowing branching paths (representing narrative choices) rising from the pages. Polly the Bee is reading/interacting with the story.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot reading a large open book that projects glowing lime green (#ecf874) branching story paths into the air. A small pixel robot watches the hologram with excitement. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. The bee wears tiny librarian glasses. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Pixel text: 'STORYFLUX'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
